holes.content: For alternating-twist quadrilayer graphene (ATQG), the selected LKM chain uses the heuristic relation theta_TBG = theta_ATQG / phi, with phi approximately 1.618, to compare ATQG twist angles with TBG-like subsystem angles; this mapping is only a comparative tool and does not guarantee quantitative equivalence of bandwidths, interaction strengths, or exact magic-angle conditions between ATQG and TBG [@Burg2022].
holes.label: gcn_51a6d18a_atqg_tbg_angle_mapping
